title.en: Time flies, and the 10,000 solstice era has pas...

content.en:
Rumble!!!!!

The energy in the depths of the Elixir Realm was condensed by the Eternal Sequence to the Dao Rules, constantly compressed, and gradually condensed.

Time flies, Ye Tian continues to compress, condense in accordance with the way of condensing the golden feather liquid, and strive to condense the resources that surpass the golden feather liquid.

Time flies, and the 10,000 solstice era has passed.

this day.

A drop of flawless golden liquid condensed out, and there was no way to continue compressing.

"It's done!"

Ye Tian picked up this drop of golden liquid and swallowed it in one gulp to see the effect of his cultivation improvement.

Rumble!!!!!

His cultivation has improved significantly, much better than refining other resources, and he also uses Divine Qiongzhu to assist in refining, and the effect is faster.

"It's a very good resource, if there are a few hundred drops, there is a high probability that I can upgrade my cultivation to the late stage of the Myth to the Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He gave the golden liquid a name—the Eternal Elixir Golden Liquid!

In the following years, he condensed the eternal elixir gold liquid here, and a drop could be condensed in the 10,000 Dao era, and the efficiency was still okay.

Time flies.

Hundreds of thousands of people knew that the era had passed, and Ye Tian had also condensed dozens of drops of Eternal Qiong Jelly Golden Liquid, and his cultivation had also improved a lot, but it was still a lot short of the late stage of the Mythical Dao Realm.

However, he had exhausted the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item, and the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule he comprehended had reached a dichotomy realm, which was okay.

"The two-point Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule, the realm is very low, but there is still hope to create the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule, if I can create such a Supreme Dao Rule, my strength will definitely skyrocket!"

Thereupon.

Ye Tian began to work hard to create the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, although the difficulty was very great, he could try again and again, and he would definitely be able to create it.

......

The depths of the abyss of eternal darkness.

Many of Ye Tian's true body copy bodies entered here, and now his strength is comparable to that of the top ten elders, even if he can't compete with all the abyssal supreme creatures, there is no problem in surviving.

So, he collected more first-order Dao rule items and innate primordial treasures here, and scraped the resources here.

He is also going to fuse a few more Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items to enhance his Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule realm!

In that case, his strength will also increase.

Moreover, the innate original treasure is such a thing, the more the merrier.

After a period of time, the first sequence of Supreme Dao Rule items and the Innate Primordial Treasure that he could find were all found by him.

"I actually obtained thirteen innate primordial treasures!"

Ye Tian was very pleasantly surprised.

He had to thank those elders for letting him guard the eternal dark abyss, otherwise where would he get such opportunities and benefits!

Human domain.

The Realm of Mira.

Xiao Yue, Ye Xingchen, and Ye Xingyue were all here, and Ye Tian called them over.

"Husband!"

"Father!"

The three shouted.

Ye Tian took out the Escape Stone, this innate primordial treasure could allow Ye Xingchen to have the ability to escape, unless he met a strong person with the first sequence of supreme rules, he would not be able to escape with the help of the Escape Stone.

"Xingchen, this is the Innate Primordial Treasure Escape Stone, you often go out to wander, this treasure can give you a very strong life-saving ability!"

Ye Tian said.

"Thank you, father!"

Ye Xingchen said excitedly.

Then, Ye Tian took out another Innate Primordial Treasure: "This is the Innate Primordial Treasure Meridian Armor, which can be integrated into the body, allowing you to have stronger combat power and defense, as well as a slight effect of improving cultivation, and it is also given to you!

took out two innate primordial treasures in one go, and Ye Xingchen was shocked.

He is also the patriarch of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance now, so he naturally knows the preciousness of the Innate Origin Treasure, some of the elders don't even have an Innate Origin Treasure, and it is very good to have an Innate Origin Treasure.

But Ye Tian casually sent out two innate primordial treasures, and he naturally had more than these two innate primordial treasures.

Then it was his wife's turn Xiao Yue.

Xiao Yue hardly goes to wander now, but as a veteran of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, she occasionally has to deal with some things.

Coupled with the affairs of the human race, his wife Xiao Yue is also helping to manage it, and she also has to give an innate original treasure.

"Yue'er, this is the Innate Origin Treasure Lin Realm Bead, it allows you to instantly seal yourself to form an indestructible defense, sealing yourself at the same time, it will also make the enemy unable to hurt you. In addition, it can also activate the power of the Lin Boundary Bead and seal the enemy, but it can only seal those who are weaker than yourself. Ye Tian said.

"Thank you, husband!"

Xiao Yue received the Lin Realm Pearl.

After that, it was the turn of his daughter Ye Xingyue, and Ye Tian also took out two innate original treasures, which had to be the same as his son.

"Xingyue, this is the Innate Primordial Treasure Xuanyue Disk, which can assist in cultivation and enhance a certain amount of comprehension; "

These two innate primordial treasures made Ye Xingyue very happy and immediately accepted them.

In addition to the innate original treasure, Ye Tian also had gifts.

He alone sent a drop of Eternal Essence Gold Liquid, which could improve their cultivation a lot.

"This is the Eternal Essence Gold Liquid, if you take it for cultivation, you can greatly improve your cultivation. In the future, every 100,000 solstice eras, you can all come to me to apply for a drop of Eternal Agar Gold Liquid!"

Ye Tian said.

He's already sent several replica bodies to condense the Eternal Elixir Gold Liquid, so there's no shortage of this stuff for now.

Ye Xingyue and Xiao Yue, they are not on the path of the strongest to the Dao, and it is slightly easier to improve their cultivation.

Therefore, Ye Tian was ready to improve his cultivation at the same time, and also improve their cultivation.

With these innate primordial treasures and the Eternal Essence Golden Liquid, Xiao Yue, Ye Xingchen, and Ye Xingyue's strength improved rapidly.

However, compared to Ye Tian's strength increase, it was not worth mentioning.

With multiple duplicate bodies condensing the Eternal Essence Gold Liquid, Ye Tian's cultivation improved much faster.

Before I knew it, another five or six hundred thousand years had passed.

With the help of a large amount of Eternal Agar Gold Liquid, Ye Tian's cultivation was finally about to be promoted to the late stage of the Mythical Dao Realm.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's cultivation made a breakthrough, and his strength increased again.

In addition, his mythical supreme body is also about to complete the fourth transformation, once the fourth transformation is completed, it will be incredible, and he definitely has the combat power second only to the first elder, I am afraid that even the second and third elders are not his opponents.

At that time, he had enough confidence to expose his strength.
